info.name: Echtirak API
info.description:
Collection covering Auth, Subscriber, Generator Owner, Admin, and Wallet endpoints.

**Recent Changes:**
- **Update Bill**: Added endpoint to update bills by canceling old bill and creating new one with modified values
- **Warning Messages**: Added endpoint to fetch dynamic warning messages for Generator Owners (e.g., insufficient balance)
- **Admin Upsert Generator Owner**: Now includes all pricing and wallet fields when creating new Generator Owners
- **Admin Wallet Management**: Added wallet top-up, cap override, view balance, and view transactions endpoints for admins
- **Admin Generator Owner Management**: Added check status and deactivate endpoints for Generator Owners
- **Wallet System**: Added wallet management endpoints (Balance, Transactions, Forecast) for Generator Owners
- **Admin Reactivate**: Added endpoint to reactivate deactivated Generator Owners (requires top-up after deactivation)
- **SMS System**: Added SMS template management (Admin) and SMS campaign management (Generator Owner)
- **Subscriber Responses**: Now include descriptive fields (GeneratorCode, BillingModeDescription, StatusDescription, CreatedByUsername, ModifiedByUsername)
- **Bill Collector Responses**: Now include `username` field from tbl_User
- **Generator Owner Profile**: Update endpoint now supports updating username and password. Get endpoint returns username.
- **Subscriber Upsert**: Added mandatory `address` field for new subscribers (INSERT operations). Address is optional for updates.
- **Bill Collector Upsert**: Now requires `username` and `password` fields. Creates user account in `tbl_User` table automatically.
- **Bill Responses**: Now include `statusDescription` from tbl_Lookup

**Variables:**
- `baseUrl`: API root (default http://localhost:5010)
- `username` / `password`: credentials for sign-in
- `token`: populated automatically after successful SignIn

Each request includes example success/failure payloads with real-world scenarios.

exec: console.log("Access token stored in collection variable");
console.log("Refresh token stored in collection variable");

request.description: Authenticates a user and returns tokens. On success, the access token is stored in the `token` collection variable for downstream requests.

response.name: 400 BadRequest - Validation

request.description: Retrieves warning messages for the Generator Owner. Messages are dynamically generated based on various conditions (e.g., insufficient balance for next billing cycle). Returns an array of warning messages with message codes and compact text suitable for popup display.

response.name: 200 OK - With Warnings

request.description: Retrieves all billing models for the authenticated generator owner. Can optionally filter by generator ID.
Creates or updates a subscription billing model. Model must be 'Metered' or 'Fixed'. For Fixed billing, amountPerKva should be 0.

item.name: Generate All Bills (Auto - All Active Subscribers)

request.description: Automatically generates bill previews for ALL ACTIVE subscribers belonging to the specified generator. Requires generatorId in request body. Bills are calculated but NOT inserted into the database. Supports bulk operations (20k+ subscribers).

Generates bill previews for a list of subscriber IDs from a SPECIFIC GENERATOR. Bills are calculated but NOT inserted into the database. Requires generatorId to ensure bills are only generated for subscribers of that generator. Supports bulk operations (up to 20k+ subscribers).
Accepts and inserts bills into the database. Use this after reviewing bills from GenerateBills endpoint. Supports bulk operations (up to 20k+ bills).

query.description: Optional: Filter by subscriber first name (prefix match)
Optional: Filter by subscriber last name (prefix match)
Optional: Filter by subscriber phone number (contains match)
Optional: Filter by subscriber full name (contains match)
Optional: Filter by bill status (PENDING, PAID, OVERDUE, etc.)
Optional: Filter by currency code (e.g., USD, LBP)
Optional: Filter bills from this date (inclusive)
Optional: Filter bills up to this date (inclusive)
Optional: Filter by bill creation date from (inclusive)
Optional: Filter by bill creation date to (inclusive)
Optional: Filter by minimum bill amount
Optional: Filter by maximum bill amount
Optional: Filter by previous KVA reading (exact match)
Optional: Filter by current KVA reading (exact match)
Optional: Filter by subscription amps (exact match)
Optional: Filter by user ID who last modified the bill
Optional: General keyword search across multiple fields (subscriber name, phone, generator code, status, amount, etc.)

request.description: Retrieves paged bills with comprehensive filtering options. Supports filtering by subscriber details, bill dates, amounts, KVA readings, status, currency, and more. Includes keyword search across multiple fields. All filters are optional and can be combined.

response.name: 200 OK - Success

originalRequest.description: Retrieves paged bills with comprehensive filtering options. Supports filtering by subscriber details, bill dates, amounts, KVA readings, status, currency, and more. Includes keyword search across multiple fields. All filters are optional and can be combined.

request.description: Updates a bill by canceling the old one and creating a new one with modified values. The old bill's status is set to CANCELED, and the new bill's GeneratedFrom field points to the old bill ID. Returns both the old (canceled) and new bills.

response.name: 200 OK - Success

request.description:
**Recent Change:** Now requires `username` and `password` fields. The stored procedure automatically creates a user account in `tbl_User` table with role `BILL_COLLECTOR`.

**For INSERT (`id = -1`):**
- `username` (required): Unique username for the bill collector
- `password` (required): Password for login (will be hashed server-side)
- `firstName`, `lastName`, `phoneNumber` (all required)

**For UPDATE (`id > 0`):**
- `username` (required): Can update username (must be unique)
- `password` (optional): Only updates if provided; otherwise keeps existing password
- `firstName`, `lastName`, `phoneNumber` (all required)

request.description:
**Recent Change:** `address` field is now **mandatory for new subscribers** (INSERT operations when `id = -1`). For updates, `address` is optional.

- Send `id = -1` (or omit) to insert a new subscriber
- Provide a positive `id` to update an existing subscriber
- All fields except `address` (on update) are required

response.name: 200 OK - Insert Success

request.description: Generates a QR code PNG image for a single subscriber. The QR code contains a URL that redirects bill collectors to the subscriber details page. The QR code includes the Echtirak logo in the center and the Electric Meter Number below it.

Generates a PDF document with QR codes for ALL subscribers under the specified generator. Each subscriber gets one page with their QR code (including logo and meter number), subscriber details (name, address, generator code), and subscriber ID. Perfect for printing and placing next to electric meters.
Lists all generator owners. Requires admin token.

originalRequest.description: Lists all generator owners. Requires admin token.

request.description: Reactivate a deactivated Generator Owner. Requires that a top-up has been made after deactivation. Withdraws funds from last pending billing cycle if exists.

response.name: 400 BadRequest - No Top-up

request.description: Check the current status of a Generator Owner (ACTIVE, DEACTIVATED, SUSPENDED) and whether they can use the platform.
Manually deactivate a Generator Owner account. Revokes all refresh tokens and sets status to DEACTIVATED.

response.name: 200 OK - Success

request.description: Add funds to a Generator Owner's wallet. Validates wallet cap before processing. If referenceNumber is not provided, it will be set to the TopUpId.

response.name: 400 BadRequest - Exceeds Cap

request.description: Set or remove a wallet cap override for a Generator Owner. Set overrideCap to null to remove override and use default cap. Cannot set cap below current balance.

response.name: 200 OK - Set Override
200 OK - Remove Override
400 BadRequest - Below Balance

request.description: View a Generator Owner's wallet balance, projected charges, and cap information. Admin-only endpoint.
